task_completion.description: The agent joined the specified Jitsi Meet meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser open to Jitsi Meet. The URL bar should show 'localhost:8080/QuarterlyPlanningSync' or the room name 'QuarterlyPlanningSync' should be clearly visible in the meeting interface.

task_completion.description: The agent enabled screen sharing within the Jitsi meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for visual indicators in the Jitsi Meet interface that screen sharing is active. This typically includes an 'infinite mirror' effect in the main video area, a message stating 'You are sharing your screen', or the screen share button in the bottom toolbar appearing highlighted or active.

task_completion.description: The agent saved a screenshot of the active screen sharing state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command (e.g., using scrot, import, or gnome-screenshot) or a GUI screenshot tool saving an image specifically to the path '/tmp/screen_share_active.png'.

task_completion.description: The agent stopped screen sharing within the Jitsi meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Jitsi Meet interface returning to the normal meeting view. The screen share button in the toolbar should be inactive (not highlighted), and there should be no 'infinite mirror' effect or screen sharing notification.

task_completion.description: The agent saved a screenshot of the stopped screen sharing state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command or GUI screenshot tool saving an image specifically to the path '/tmp/screen_share_stopped.png'.

integrity.description: The agent used a real graphical web browser to access Jitsi Meet.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent interacted with a graphical web browser (like Chromium or Firefox) to join the meeting and click the screen share buttons, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) to fake the interaction.

integrity.description: The screen sharing state is a genuine Jitsi Meet behavior.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the screen sharing state looks like actual Jitsi Meet interface behavior (e.g., actual UI changes, infinite mirror effect) and not a manually opened image or text file designed to trick the verifier.

integrity.description: The agent used actual screenshot tools to capture the screen.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the agent executed a screenshot command or used a screenshot utility to create the .png files, rather than moving, copying, or renaming pre-existing files to the target paths.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Jitsi meeting URL is http://localhost:8080/QuarterlyPlanningSync. The active screen share screenshot must be saved exactly to /tmp/screen_share_active.png. The stopped screen share screenshot must be saved exactly to /tmp/screen_share_stopped.png.
